scripts.deploy: npm run db:migrate:remote && opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy

CF_TOKEN.description: Runtime Cloudflare API token used by Mailflare onboarding to call the Zones and Email Routing APIs. Cloudflare's deploy/build token is not passed to the app, so create this separately at https://dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens with `Zone Read`, `Email Routing Edit`, `Email Sending Edit`, and `Email Routing Rules Write` permissions for the zones you will connect. Paste only the token secret value, without `Bearer`.

CF_ACCOUNT_ID.description: Optional Cloudflare account ID. Leave blank unless your API token can access multiple accounts.

CF_EMAIL_WORKER_NAME.description: Worker name used when creating Cloudflare Email Routing rules. Keep this aligned with the `name` in `wrangler.jsonc`; the template default is `mailflare`.

CF_EMAIL.description: Legacy Global API Key auth only. Use this with `CF_API_KEY` instead of `CF_TOKEN`.

CF_API_KEY.description: Legacy Global API Key auth only. Prefer `CF_TOKEN` for new deployments.
